## Findings

### Was centronias actually in Congress #21 as a debater?

Yes. The `congress-0021.json` session file confirms centronias appears in the `roster` field alongside all other active personas. More critically, the roster is used as the candidate pool fed into `congress_select_seats`, which then picks the 5 actual debaters. So centronias was available to be selected as a debater.
